channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New chemical kills 95% of termites without harming humans
item.description: Scientists may have found a smarter, safer way to wipe out termites hiding inside homes. A chemical called bistrifluron prevents drywood termites from...

item.title: Physicists discover quantum particles that break the rules of reality
item.description: Physicists may have just cracked open a hidden side of the quantum world. For decades, every known particle was thought to belong to one of two catego...

item.title: Deep diving fur seals experience delayed heart surges after returning to land
item.description: Fur seals may look like they’re simply resting after exhausting hunting trips at sea, but their bodies are secretly working overtime. Scientists disco...

item.title: Scientists say this simple music trick can boost workout endurance by 20%
item.description: A new study shows that listening to your own favorite workout music can dramatically boost endurance. Cyclists exercising with self-selected songs las...
